description: The Ministry of Health has updated the Child Health protocol. Update the 'Child Programme' in DHIS2 to include a new Data Element named 'Chlorhexidine Gel Applied' (Short Name: 'Chlorhexidine', Domain Type: 'Tracker', Value Type: 'Yes/No') within the 'Birth' Program Stage. Configure this data element in the stage to be 'Compulsory' and set to 'Display in Reports'. Login credentials: admin / district.
